steps.title: Complete Online Evaluation
steps.description: Answer questions about your health history, symptoms, and goals. Takes about 5 minutes.

steps.title: Physician Review
steps.description: A licensed U.S. physician reviews your information and creates a personalized treatment plan.

steps.title: Prescription & Delivery
steps.description: Your prescription is sent to a licensed pharmacy and delivered to your door — fast and discreet.

steps.title: Ongoing Support
steps.description: Ongoing care, follow-ups, and adjustments as needed — all from the comfort of home.

trustBadges.title: Licensed Physicians
trustBadges.description: All prescriptions written by U.S.-licensed doctors

trustBadges.title: HIPAA Compliant
trustBadges.description: Your health data is always private and secure

trustBadges.title: Free Shipping
trustBadges.description: Discreet delivery to your door, always free
